title: Tauranga Family Deals
meta_desc: Find the best family deals in Tauranga and Mount Maunganui, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance from $4.50/day, for a budget of $180-380/day for a family of 4
intro: Tauranga and Mount Maunganui are a top destination for family holidays in New Zealand, offering a range of activities and accommodations to suit all budgets. With a daily budget of $180-380 for a family of four, you can enjoy the best of what the region has to offer. From surfing and swimming at Mount Beach to exploring the Papamoa Hills Regional Park, there's something for everyone in this popular beach town.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in Rotorua, Queenstown, Bay of Islands, and Auckland, which can be a great way to save money on your family holiday. Discover Cars has family campervans available from $89/day, and Booking.com is offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings. Additionally, Cover-More is providing comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day.

These deals can help you plan a fun and affordable family holiday in Tauranga and Mount Maunganui. Be sure to check the Bookme.co.nz website for the latest discounts and promotions.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com
Comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
Some of the best-value activities in Tauranga and Mount Maunganui include surfing and swimming at Mount Beach, walking to the summit of Mount Maunganui, and exploring the Papamoa Hills Regional Park. These activities are free or low-cost and offer a great way to experience the region's natural beauty.

If you're looking for something more adventurous, consider taking a surf lesson or visiting the Hot Pools at the Mount. These activities are reasonably priced and can be a fun way to spend time with your family.
list: Surfing and swimming at Mount Beach
Walking to the summit of Mount Maunganui
Exploring the Papamoa Hills Regional Park
Visiting the Hot Pools at the Mount

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body: To save money on your family holiday in Tauranga and Mount Maunganui, consider the following tips:
list: Book your accommodations and activities in advance to get the best prices
Look for packages that include multiple activities or accommodations
Consider visiting during the off-season to save money
Pack your own food and snacks instead of eating out
Take advantage of free activities such as walking to the summit of Mount Maunganui or exploring the Papamoa Hills Regional Park
Use public transportation or walk/bike whenever possible to save money on fuel and parking

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices on your family holiday in Tauranga and Mount Maunganui, it's a good idea to book your accommodations and activities as far in advance as possible. This can help you save money and ensure that you get the accommodations and activities you want.

Additionally, consider visiting during the off-season, which is typically from April to September. During this time, prices for accommodations and activities tend to be lower, making it a great time to save money on your family holiday.
